meta.title: Haarmonie Gelsenkirchen | Hair Salon with Online Booking
meta.description: Hair & beauty salon in Gelsenkirchen. Women's & men's cuts, coloring, highlights, updos. Book your appointment online in seconds.

hero.headline: Your new look — booked online in 60 seconds
hero.subline: From a classic cut to a balayage: enjoy relaxed pampering at your salon in the heart of Gelsenkirchen.

services.title: What we do for you
services.subtitle: From a quick trim to a complete color makeover — all from one place.
services.service1Desc: A cut tailored to you, including consultation, wash and blow-dry.
services.service2Desc: Classic or modern — a precise cut with clean contours and finish.
services.service3Desc: Brilliant colors with high-quality, gentle products.
services.service4Desc: Natural highlights, foil techniques or soft balayage.
services.service5Desc: Beautifully styled for weddings, proms or any special occasion.
services.service6Desc: Patient and child-friendly — the first salon visit becomes a treat.

about.title: Haarmonie — a salon to feel good in
about.description: Since 2013 we have combined craftsmanship with genuine advice. We take our time, listen, and bring out the best in your style — in a relaxed atmosphere in the heart of Gelsenkirchen.
about.feature1Desc: We take our time and advise you honestly on cut, color and care.
about.feature2Desc: Six trained stylists with an eye for detail.
about.feature3Desc: Choose a service, day and time — no phone queue required.

process.title: Your appointment in 4 steps
process.subtitle: Fast, transparent and from anywhere, anytime.
process.step1Desc: Pick a service, day and free time slot online — in under a minute.
process.step2Desc: You instantly receive a confirmation of your chosen appointment.
process.step3Desc: Sit back and relax — our team takes care of your look.
process.step4Desc: Leave the salon with a result that's exactly right for you.

consent.title: We respect your privacy
consent.description: We use cookies and external services (Google Maps, Google AI chat) to give you the best possible experience. You decide what gets loaded.
consent.necessaryDesc: Essential for the operation of the website. Always active.
consent.mapsDesc: Loads the interactive map. Data is transferred to Google in the process.
consent.aiDesc: Enables the AI reception. Your messages are sent to Google Gemini.
consent.mapsGateText: To display the map you need to consent to Google Maps. Data is transferred to Google.
consent.aiGateText: For the AI reception your messages are sent to Google Gemini. Please consent.

faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your visit — answered quickly.
faq.q1A: Simply choose your desired service, a free time slot, and enter your contact details. Booking takes under 60 seconds. You'll receive an instant confirmation by email.
faq.q2Q: Can I cancel my appointment for free?
faq.q2A: Yes, you can cancel free of charge up to 24 hours in advance. Please let us know by phone or email. For no-shows without notice, we reserve the right to charge a cancellation fee.
faq.q3Q: How far in advance should I book?
faq.q3A: For simple cuts, we recommend booking 2–3 days ahead. For coloring, balayage or bridal styling, please book at least 1–2 weeks in advance, as these slots fill up quickly.
faq.q4Q: Are washing and blow-drying included in the price?
faq.q4A: For women's cuts, washing and blow-drying are already included in the listed prices. Men's cuts are done dry; washing is optional. See our full price list for details.
faq.q5Q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.q5A: We accept cash and debit cards (Girocard). Credit cards (Visa, Mastercard) are also welcome. Gift cards can be redeemed directly in the salon.
faq.q6Q: Do you cut children's hair, and from what age?
faq.q6A: We cut children's hair from age 3. Our stylists have plenty of experience with the youngest guests and always take extra time. Special prices apply for children up to 6 — just select 'Children's Cut' when booking.
